name: Telia Company AB
description: Telia Company AB is a prominent Nordic and Baltic telecommunications operator headquartered in Solna, Sweden. The company provides a wide range of services, including mobile, broadband, television, and IT solutions, catering to both private individuals and business customers. As a major player in the telecommunications sector, Telia focuses on digital infrastructure and connectivity, driving innovation across its markets in Sweden, Finland, Norway, Denmark, Estonia, Latvia, and Lithuania. The company is committed to sustainable business practices and plays a critical role in enabling digital transformation and communication across the region.
